response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-04:22: Identified 'キツネノマド (Queen Fox)' by Umetora (梅とら), performed by Hakos Baelz, Ouro Kronii, and IRyS. 2. 04:22-End: Identified 'HIT ME UP' by KIRA, monii, and Johnny R, performed by Hakos Baelz, Ceres Fauna, and Mori Calliope. 3. Used web search to find details and lyrics for both songs. Note: Lyrics for 'キツネノマド' were difficult to find with a generic search, so they were left as null. Full lyrics for 'HIT ME UP' were retrieved.
response.global_summary: A video featuring two song performances. The first song, 'キツネノマド (Queen Fox)', is performed by Hakos Baelz, Ouro Kronii, and IRyS. The second song, 'HIT ME UP', is performed by Hakos Baelz, Ceres Fauna, and Mori Calliope.

scenes.description: The song 'キツネノマド (Queen Fox)' is performed by Hakos Baelz, Ouro Kronii, and IRyS. Lyrics and music are by Umetora.
The song 'HIT ME UP' is performed by Hakos Baelz, Ceres Fauna, and Mori Calliope. The song is by KIRA, monii, and Johnny R.
scenes.performer_in_video: Hakos Baelz, Ceres Fauna, Mori Calliope
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
(Verse 1)
Everyday I spent crying 'bout almost-loves turned complicated
On the way, yeah
My heart got torn up, shredded, all but dead and
Now they say I
I'm just a masochist, they're sick of it
Boy take a hint
You ain't gon' ever get this
Pedal to the metal, shootin' straight to the stars
Got a cravin', like the danger on me
(Yeah she like it like that, like that)
Up another level, temptation you just can't deny
Come get a taste but can't say I won't bite
(Chorus)
(So hit me up!)
Off the map I'mma take it, all my energy
(So hit me up!)
Speedin' up fast, ready, target locked
(So hit me up!)
Hit the dash, I'm upgraded and you want a piece
(So hit me up!)
So hit me up, ah, I never stop
...[Full lyrics provided in search result]
